title: Negative Recognition
html: Stub. Proving you are not on a list (e.g. airport no-fly screening, employee background checks). Passwords/PINs cannot do this — only biometric recognition can. Almost always operated semi-automatically: the system narrows candidates and a human makes the final call. First mentioned in 2025 04 27 biometrics fmr fnmr cost benefit. Adjacent to surveillance state.

related.label: Biometrics survey — FMR/FNMR, identification vs verification, cost-benefit
Jain paper — verification vs identification + negative recognition
